text.title: Certificate Rotation Pipeline (cert-manager / Terraform / Compose) Core Rules
text.summary: 6 testable rules grounding the cicd-cert-rotation-pipeline methodology. Each rule pairs a binary check + sourced rationale and is referenced by the decision tree.

rule.statement: Private keys MUST NOT be committed to Git; the pipeline MUST emit keys only into a secrets manager (Vault, AWS Secrets Manager, K8s Secret) and reference them by name.
rule.rationale: Private keys in Git are unrecoverable from a security standpoint — rotation cost is non-trivial and historical exposure is permanent.

rule.statement: Pipeline MUST follow author → render → scan → apply: cert-manager Certificate CRD or Terraform module is authored; CI renders effective YAML; a scanner (`kubectl-validate`, `tflint`) gates; only then is it applied.
rule.rationale: Direct kubectl apply bypasses review and lint; render-scan-apply is the minimum safe path.

rule.statement: Renewal MUST trigger at least 30 days before NotAfter; cert-manager's `spec.renewBefore` MUST be set explicitly (not relying on the 2/3-lifetime default for short-lived certs).
rule.rationale: Without an explicit `renewBefore`, short-lived certs may renew too late; explicit configuration is the safe path.

rule.statement: Prometheus MUST alert when any certificate in the cluster has < 7 days to expiry; cert-manager metrics `certmanager_certificate_expiration_timestamp_seconds` MUST be scraped.
rule.rationale: Renewal failures are silent until the alert fires; 7 days is the floor for operator response.

rule.statement: Each environment MUST use its own ClusterIssuer / Terraform ACM module; staging and prod MUST NOT share an issuer.

rationale.source: cert-manager docs — Issuers, Internal security review

rule.rationale: Shared issuers cross-pollinate rate-limit budgets and create blast-radius coupling between environments.

rule.statement: If TLS termination is fully handled by a managed load balancer (AWS ALB + ACM, GCP HTTPS LB + Google-managed cert) with auto-renewal, this methodology MUST be skipped.

rationale.source: AWS ACM docs, GCP managed cert docs

rule.rationale: Managed-LB certs renew transparently; an IaC pipeline duplicates and risks drift.
